parsed.explanation: Two corrections were made, both involving stray/incorrect closing </TITLE> tags. Since the title content in each case ran continuously up to these points, I removed the duplicate/misplaced closing tags so that each TITLE element is properly opened and closed exactly once, with the full title text contained within.
